name: Podcast Episode Finder
description: Find and summarize relevant podcast episodes on any topic

agents.name: Podcast Searcher
agents.system_prompt_hint: Search podcast directories and review sites for episodes about the specified topic. Find episode titles, show names, guest names, duration, and descriptions.

agents.name: Episode Curator
agents.purpose: Curate a listening list with summaries
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a curated listening list. For each episode include: show name, episode title, guest, duration, key topics covered, and a brief summary. Rank by relevance.

suggestion_card.title: Podcast Finder
suggestion_card.subtitle: Find podcast episodes on any topic

author: agentfactory
